channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Punjab Schools Set to Reopen on April 1, No Extension in Holidays
item.description: Punjab's Education Minister, Rana Sikandar Hayat, has confirmed that schools across the province will reopen on April 1, ending the current school holiday period. The announcement comes after the prov...

item.title: Petroleum Dealers Delay Strike Amid Global Fuel Crisis Due to Middle East Tensions
item.description: Petroleum dealers in Pakistan have decided to postpone a strike they had planned to begin on March 26, 2026, due to the ongoing crisis in the Middle East. The escalating conflict in the region has cau...

item.title: Petroleum Dealers Delay Strike Amid Global Fuel Shortage Concerns
item.description: Petroleum dealers in Pakistan have decided to delay a planned strike that was set to begin on March 26, 2026, due to the ongoing Middle East conflict. The Pakistan Petroleum Dealers Association (PPDA)...

item.title: Progress MS-33 Successfully Launched and Docked with ISS Using Manual TORU System
item.description: On March 24, 2026, the Progress MS-33 cargo spacecraft was launched atop a Soyuz 2.1a rocket from Baikonur Cosmodrome. Carrying 2509 kg of cargo, including food, water, oxygen, and fuel, the Progress ...

item.title: Kasim Khan Raises Imran Khan's Case at UNHRC, Alleges Violation of Human Rights in Jail
item.description: Kasim Khan, the son of PTI leader Imran Khan, highlighted his father's treatment in prison at the United Nations Human Rights Council (UNHRC) session on March 25, 2026. Imran Khan, who has been in Adi...

item.title: Arusha Benefits from Hosting Conferences and Conventions
item.description: Arusha, a key city in Tanzania, has experienced significant economic growth due to hosting a variety of conferences and events. The Arusha Regional Commissioner, Amos Makala, recently acknowledged the...

item.title: Pakistan set to host possible US-Iran peace talks amid regional tensions
item.description: The International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) Director General Rafael Grossi has revealed that the United States and Iran are expected to hold wider-ranging negotiations in Islamabad this weekend. He ...

item.title: PMDC orders 10 universities to halt unrecognised postgraduate medical and dental degrees
item.description: The Pakistan Medical and Dental Council (PMDC) has officially declared that ten universities across the country have been conducting postgraduate programmes for MBBS and BDS doctors without proper rec...

item.title: Pakistan to commence Hajj 2026 flights from April 18, carrying 119,000 pilgrims to Madinah and Makkah
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Pakistan is set to begin its Hajj operations for 2026 starting on April 18, continuing till May 21, under the official government Hajj scheme. According to the Ministry of Religious Affairs...

item.title: The Centuries-Long Sunni-Shiite Divide: A Struggle for Power Rooted in the Death of Prophet Muhammad
item.description: The schism between Sunnis and Shiites traces back over fourteen centuries to the death of Prophet Muhammad in 632 CE. The absence of a clear successor sparked a deep division, with one group advocatin...

item.title: BBC appoints former Google executive Matt Brittin as director general amid legal and funding challenges
item.description: The BBC has announced Matt Brittin, a former Google executive, as its new director general, taking over from Tim Davie, who resigned last year after controversy over an edited speech by former US Pres...

item.title: Gold Prices Drop Amid Middle East Conflict and Global Market Pressures
item.description: Despite gold’s reputation as a safe-haven asset, the price has seen a sharp decline this year following the outbreak of the Middle East war. Investors, facing heightened uncertainty and the need for c...

item.title: Iran Rejects US Peace Proposal, Lists 5 Conditions for Ending the War
item.description: Iran has firmly rejected a proposal from the United States aimed at ending the ongoing conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran. According to a report from Iran's state-run Press TV, Tehran is determ...

item.title: South Korean prisoner serving life in the Philippines temporarily extradited over drug trafficking charges
item.description: South Korean authorities have taken into custody Park Wang-yeol, a 47-year-old man accused of leading a major drug trafficking operation from inside the New Bilibid Prison in Muntinlupa City, Philippi...

item.title: Knowledge Channel Partners with Cable Operators to Broaden DepEd TV Coverage Across the Philippines
item.description: In a significant move to improve the accessibility of educational content across the country, Knowledge Channel has partnered with major cable operators to expand the reach of DepEd TV. This collabora...

item.title: NDMA Issues Warning for Rain and Thunderstorms Across Pakistan in Next 24 Hours
item.description: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) has issued an advisory forecasting rain, thunderstorms, and strong winds across Pakistan in the next 24 hours. A western wind system from Balochistan ...

item.title: Sri Lanka Adopts Four-Day Workweek Due to Energy Crisis Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: Sri Lanka has introduced a government-mandated four-day workweek to tackle an ongoing energy crisis that has worsened due to the war in the Middle East. The conflict, particularly the US-Israel bombin...

item.title: China Restricts Manus Cofounders Amid Investigation of Meta Acquisition
item.description: China has imposed travel restrictions on the cofounders of Manus, an AI startup acquired by Meta in late 2025 for an estimated $2 to $3 billion. Xiao Hong, Manus' CEO, and Ji Yichao, its chief scienti...

item.title: Usher Reflects on His Respect for Diddy Despite Controversies
item.description: In a recent interview with Forbes’ The Enterprise Zone, Usher Raymond, 47, spoke candidly about his ongoing respect for Sean 'Diddy' Combs, 56, despite the public controversies surrounding him. Usher ...

item.title: Gamondi sticks to AFCON squad, brings in fresh talent for future growth
item.description: Miguel Gamondi, the head coach of Tanzania's national football team, Taifa Stars, has confirmed his commitment to building a competitive future by mixing experience with young talent. As preparations ...
